message:
fix(backpressure): atomic tier + entered_at under a single lock (ft-89fl5)

BackpressureManager previously held current_tier and tier_entered_at in
two separate RwLocks. A concurrent evaluator could observe a half-applied
transition (new tier + stale entered_at) and incorrectly treat the
hysteresis window as already elapsed, allowing a downgrade that should
have been blocked.

Collapse both fields into a single `tier_state: RwLock<TierState>` and
hold the write guard across the read-check-apply sequence so every
observer sees either (old tier, old entered_at) or (new tier, new
entered_at), never the cross.

149 backpressure + continuous_backpressure tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
